<h2 id="whatsapp-business-platform-ecosystem" class="wp-block-heading is-typography-preset-heading-1 is-typography-preset-heading-2">WhatsApp Business Platform Ecosystem</h2>



<p class="is-typography-preset-heading-5 wp-block-paragraph">The ecosystem is split into two types of partners</p>



<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-0a4dc64c wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex has-2-columns">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-1a210be6 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">

<h3 id="tech-partners" class="wp-block-heading is-typography-preset-heading-5">Tech Partners</h3>



<p class="is-typography-preset-body-md wp-block-paragraph">Tech Partners are third party developers who build value added solutions on top of the WhatsApp Business Platform. These solutions can be offered independently or as part of a joint solution with a Solution Partner.<sup>*</sup></p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Third Party Developers → Tech Provider → Tech Partner</p>



<p class="is-typography-preset-body-md has-text-gray-color has-text-color has-link-color has-button-sm-font-size wp-elements-71c75a77c881cc850033865f02c60493 wp-block-paragraph"><sup>*</sup> Note: Third party developers must onboard first as a Tech Provider before upgrading to Tech Partner.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-1a210be6 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">

<h3 id="solution-partners" class="wp-block-heading is-typography-preset-heading-5">Solution Partners</h3>



<p class="is-typography-preset-body-md wp-block-paragraph">Solution Partners offer end-to-end solutions for businesses which includes driving awareness of WhatsApp Business Platform solutions, providing integration services, and offering customer support. Only Solution Partners can extend a line of credit to businesses for payment.</p>

<h2 id="why-become-a-tech-provider" class="wp-block-heading is-typography-preset-heading-3 is-style-default has-heading-2-font-size is-typography-preset-heading-2">Why become a Tech Provider?</h2>



<p class="is-typography-preset-body-md wp-block-paragraph">Build and launch solutions on WhatsApp easier and faster.</p>



<h3 id="simple-client-onboarding" class="wp-block-heading is-typography-preset-heading-4">Simple client onboarding</h3>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li class="wp-block-list-item">Onboard clients to your solution using embedded signup. This helps to improve customer onboarding times, speed to market, and gives more visibility to your business and solution. <a href="https://developers.facebook.com/docs/whatsapp/solution-providers/get-started-for-tech-providers#onboarding-business-customers" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" data-creative-detail="MfdBecomeATechProvider_LearnMore_WhyBecomeATechProvider_InlineLink" data-creative-type="link" data-ms="{"creative":"link","creative_detail":"MfdBecomeATechProvider_LearnMore_WhyBecomeATechProvider_InlineLink"}"><strong>Learn more.</strong></a></li>
</ul>



<h3 id="enable-easier-campaign-development" class="wp-block-heading is-typography-preset-heading-4">Enable easier campaign development</h3>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li class="wp-block-list-item">Manage WhatsApp Manager on behalf of your clients. Give them the tools to use your solution to create and deploy campaigns on WhatsApp.</li>
</ul>



<h3 id="scale-solutions-to-more-clients" class="wp-block-heading is-typography-preset-heading-4">Scale solutions to more clients</h3>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li class="wp-block-list-item">Account sharing allows clients to work with multiple Tech Providers and Solution Partners. This enables you to deploy solutions to new clients at scale by collaborating with Solution Partners.</li>
</ul>

            const cookieMatches = template.match(/\{\{([^}]+)\}\}/g);
            if (cookieMatches) {
                let processed = template;
                cookieMatches.forEach(function(match) {
                    const cookieName = match.replace(/\{\{|\}\}/g, '');
                    const cookieValue = Cookies.get(cookieName) || '';
                    processed = processed.replace(match, cookieValue);
                });
                return processed;
            }
            
            // Return as-is for static values (backward compatibility)
            return template;
        }

        document.addEventListener('HandL-After-Main-Function', () => {
            if (typeof handl_utm_dyo_logic === 'object') {
                // Convert to array if it's not already
                const logicArray = Array.isArray(handl_utm_dyo_logic) ? handl_utm_dyo_logic : [handl_utm_dyo_logic];
                
                logicArray.forEach(function(group) {
                    if (!group || !group.conditions || !Array.isArray(group.conditions)) return;

                    const logicType = group.logic_type || 'or';
                    const conditionsResult = evaluateConditionsJS(group.conditions, logicType);
                    
                    if (conditionsResult && group.then_actions && Array.isArray(group.then_actions)) {
                        // Execute THEN actions
                        executeActionsJS(group.then_actions);
                    } else if (!conditionsResult && group.else_actions && Array.isArray(group.else_actions)) {
                        // Execute ELSE actions  
                        executeActionsJS(group.else_actions);
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        function executeActionsJS(actions) {
            actions.forEach(function(action) {
                if (action.param && action.value) {
                    const processedValue = processDynamicValue(action.value);
                    SetRefLink(action.param, processedValue, true, 0);
                }
            });
        }

        function evaluateConditionsJS(conditions, logicType) {
            let allConditionsMet = true;
            let anyConditionMet = false;

            // Process each condition in the group
            conditions.forEach(function(condition) {
                if (!condition || !condition.utm_param || !condition.operator) return;

                const utmValue = Cookies.get(condition.utm_param) || '';
                const conditionResult = checkCondition(utmValue, condition.operator, condition.utm_value);

                if (logicType === 'and') {
                    if (!conditionResult) {
                        allConditionsMet = false;
                    }
                } else { // OR logic
                    if (conditionResult) {
                        anyConditionMet = true;
                    }
                }
            });

            return (logicType === 'and' && allConditionsMet) || (logicType === 'or' && anyConditionMet);
        }

        function checkCondition(value, operator, compare) {
            // Handle 'defined' and 'not_defined' operators that don't need a compare value
            if (operator === 'defined') {
                return value !== undefined && value !== '';
            }
            if (operator === 'not_defined') {
                return value === undefined || value === '';
            }

            // Skip other checks if we don't have a compare value
            if (!compare || compare === 'N/A') return false;

            switch (operator) {
                case 'equals':
                    return value === compare;
                case 'not_equals':
                    return value !== compare;
                case 'contains':
                    return value.indexOf(compare) !== -1;
                case 'not_contains':
                    return value.indexOf(compare) === -1;
                case 'starts_with':
                    return value.startsWith(compare);
                case 'ends_with':
                    return value.endsWith(compare);
                case 'regex':
                    try {
                        return new RegExp(compare).test(value);
                    } catch (e) {
                        console.error('Invalid regex pattern:', compare);
                        return false;
                    }
                default:
                    return false;
            }
        }
        </script>
